positive: Minimalist geometric floral bouquet arrangement, featuring stylized abstract flowers and foliage in complementary muted tones (sage green, terracotta, dusty blue, cream). The composition should be symmetrical and centralized, using thick, clean lines and flat color blocking for a modern, retro mid-century aesthetic. The style should emulate screen printing or graphic illustration, with a strong, crisp silhouette against a solid white background. Perfect for apparel printing, ensuring clear edges and scalable design elements. Vector art quality, isolated subject, high contrast.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, smoke, low detail, noise, artifact, text, signature, watermark, ugly, amateur, multiple subjects, bad anatomy
